title: Shivajinagar Office Robbery
description: A finance company office in Shivajinagar was robbed during lunch hour when skeleton staff was present. Two suspects entered posing as clients, produced weapons, tied staff, and took Rs 18 lakhs from the cash safe. Out within 6 minutes.
modus_operandi: Client disguise entry, lunch hour timing, skeleton staff exploitation, safe targeted, rapid exit under 10 minutes.

suspects.description: Male, 5'8", wore formal shirt and trousers, led entry
Male, 5'10", armed, kept watch at door

evidence.description: Reception camera captured both suspects entering in formal wear
Staff described suspect 1 as having a scar above left eyebrow
Cable ties used to bind staff — specific brand traced to a hardware shop nearby

blind_spots: Cable tie brand not traced until day 8
Lunch hour vulnerability not flagged for similar offices in the area
Client entry log not checked on day 0
resolution: Hardware shop owner identified buyer from CCTV. Suspect 1 identified and arrested day 12. Led to suspect 2.
